series_metadata.series_description: Documentation of the specialist panel Independent Medical Examination (IME) report review performed by the Chief Medical Advisor and/or Director of Medical Services. The review is to determine if the medical examination conforms with the requirements set forth by the agency. These reviews are done annually, or on a as needed basis. The information contained in these reviews is confidential per O.R.C. 2305.24

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Electronic copies are not be deleted and are be kept indefinitely
